controls.title: CAR Filing Requirements
controls.description: The GAID specifies the format, content, and deadline for the annual Compliance Audit Return. Filing fee is based on organisation category.

controls.title: DPCO Obligations
controls.description: Data Protection Compliance Organisations must be licensed by the NDPC, maintain professional indemnity insurance, and file returns for all clients.

controls.title: Data Processing Agreements
controls.description: A signed Data Processing Agreement (DPA) must be in place between every data controller and their data processors before processing begins.

controls.title: Privacy Notice Requirements
controls.description: Privacy notices must be clear, concise, and provided at the point of data collection. Must include lawful basis, retention period, and data subject rights.

controls.title: International Transfer Safeguards
controls.description: Before any international transfer, organisations must conduct a Transfer Impact Assessment (TIA) and implement approved transfer mechanisms.

controls.title: Incident Response Requirements
controls.description: Organisations must maintain a documented incident response plan and test it annually. Breaches must be documented in a breach register.
